register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join DigitaLockbox and secure your digital life

passwordManager.title: Password Manager
passwordManager.subtitle: Securely manage all your passwords in one place
passwordManager.getStarted: Get started by adding your first password
passwordManager.deletePasswordMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this password? This action cannot be undone.
passwordManager.deleteFolderMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? Passwords in this folder will not be deleted.
passwordManager.deleteTagMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? Password entries will not be affected.

landing.heroSubtitle: Stop using sticky notes. Start using the password manager that puts your security first.
landing.clickToGenerate: Click generate to create a password
landing.crackingDemoTitle: Watch Passwords Get Cracked in Real-Time
landing.evenWeCantSee: Even we can't see your passwords
landing.onlyOneToRemember: The only one you need to remember
landing.militaryGradeEncryptionDesc: PBKDF2 + AES-128 encryption keeps your data secure
landing.instantAccessDesc: One click to fill passwords anywhere
landing.crossPlatformSyncDesc: Access your vault from any device

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
forgotPassword.emailSentMessage2: you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.expireNotice: The link will expire in 24 hours. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.

emailVerification.defaultLoadingMessage: Please wait while we verify your email address...

folders.noFoldersYet: No folders yet. Create one to organize your passwords.

tags.noTagsYet: No tags yet. Create one to categorize your passwords.

shareModal.maxViewsHelp: Link expires after this many views
shareModal.securityNoticeText: This link will expire after the set time or number of views. Share it securely.

masterPasswordModal.title: Enter Master Password
masterPasswordModal.description: Your master password is required to encrypt and decrypt passwords.

tagSelector.noTagsYet: No tags yet. Create one below!

settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: Update your password to keep your account secure
changePassword.successMessage: You will be redirected to login with your new password...

exportPasswords.title: Export Passwords
exportPasswords.subtitle: Download all your passwords in XLSX format
exportPasswords.successMessage: Your passwords have been downloaded as an XLSX file.
exportPasswords.securityWarningText: The exported file contains your passwords in plain text. Keep it secure and delete it after use.
exportPasswords.securityNotice1: Exported file contains all your passwords in plain text
exportPasswords.securityNotice2: Store the file in a secure location
exportPasswords.securityNotice3: Delete the file after use if no longer needed
exportPasswords.securityNotice4: Never share or upload this file to unsecured locations

importPasswords.title: Import Passwords
importPasswords.subtitle: Upload passwords from XLSX, CSV, or JSON file
importPasswords.fileFormatText: XLSX, CSV, and JSON files are supported. The file should contain columns: name, site, username, password, notes.
importPasswords.securityWarningText: Ensure the file comes from a trusted source. All passwords will be encrypted with your master password.
importPasswords.invalidFileType: Please select a valid file (.xlsx, .csv, or .json)
importPasswords.noFileSelected: Please select a file to import
importPasswords.guideline4: Passwords will be encrypted with your master password

sharedPasswordView.missingEncryptionKey: Missing encryption key in URL. This link may be incomplete.
sharedPasswordView.failedToDecrypt: Failed to decrypt password. The link may be invalid.
sharedPasswordView.linkInvalid: The link is invalid or has been revoked
sharedPasswordView.someoneShared: Someone has securely shared a password with you
sharedPasswordView.securityNoticeText: This share link may have limited views and an expiration time. Make sure to save the password securely. This link may not work after you leave this page.

changePassword.newPasswordMustBeDifferent: New password must be different from current password
changePassword.passwordChangedSuccess: Password changed successfully! Please sign in with your new password.
changePassword.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

emailVerification.emailVerifiedSignIn: Email verified! Please sign in to continue.
